creator: markj@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Georgios Leventis from comment #6)
The only thing I can suggest is to try applying microcode updates, if any are available.  I remember seeing a number of reports of this issue when Ryzen was released, and they were resolved by BIOS updates.  I'm not sure why you're not able to apply one.  I doubt any amount of kernel debugging will uncover the bug, it would be better to review any available AMD erratum notices for your CPU and look for any that might be relevant here.
